description: The DirectVisemeDriver component takes a viseme analyser source and a few modifying sources in order to drive a list of Visemes.

fields.Source: The viseme analyser used as a source of data.
fields.MouthTrackingSource: A source of mouth tracking that influences final results. Use a Component:AvatarMouthDataSourceAssigner To assign to this automatically.
fields.StrengthMultiplier: How much to multiply the values from ``Source`` before sending them to the drives on this component.
fields.VoiceMouthSupressWeight: How much visemes should be affected by ``MouthTrackingSource`` if the user is not talking. Lower values mean the affect from ``MouthTrackingSource`` is greater.
fields.LaughThreshold: How much probability for laughter is needed before it sends it to ``Laugh``
fields.Silence: How quiet the source data is overall.
fields.PP: The field to drive with ``PP`` from ``Source`` after applying filters from this component.
fields.FF: The field to drive with ``FF`` from ``Source`` after applying filters from this component.
fields.TH: The field to drive with ``TH`` from ``Source`` after applying filters from this component.
fields.DD: The field to drive with ``DD`` from ``Source`` after applying filters from this component.
fields.kk: The field to drive with ``kk`` from ``Source`` after applying filters from this component.
fields.CH: The field to drive with ``CH`` from ``Source`` after applying filters from this component.
fields.SS: The field to drive with ``SS`` from ``Source`` after applying filters from this component.
fields.nn: The field to drive with ``nn`` from ``Source`` after applying filters from this component.
fields.RR: The field to drive with ``RR`` from ``Source`` after applying filters from this component.
fields.aa: The field to drive with ``aa`` from ``Source`` after applying filters from this component.
fields.E: The field to drive with ``E`` from ``Source`` after applying filters from this component.
fields.ih: The field to drive with ``ih`` from ``Source`` after applying filters from this component.
fields.oh: The field to drive with ``oh`` from ``Source`` after applying filters from this component.
fields.ou: The field to drive with ``ou`` from ``Source`` after applying filters from this component.
fields.Laugh: The field to drive with ``Laugh`` from ``Source`` after applying filters from this component.

methods.AutoAssignTargets: Assigns the blendshapes from the first SkinnedMeshRenderer based on the matching rules from Visemes to the drive fields of this component.
